title: Wailorge (Cobblemon)
description:
This is a Data Pack for Cobblemon!
Have you ever feel like Wailord in Cobblemon are too small and stuff and they don't even fly? With this Addon, you can make your Wailord proportionally larger and fly!
body:
Have you ever feel like Wailord in Cobblemon are too small and stuff and they don't even fly? With this Addon, you can make your Wailord proportionally larger and fly!

**SO YOUR WAILORD CAN BE THE BEHEMOTH THEY ARE ALWAYS MEANT TO BE**.

To install Data pack, go into your _.Minecraft_ folder.
Click into the world you want this Data pack on, find the folder name _Datapacks_, put the .zip file into that folder and extract it.
You are now good to go!
